title: Raizen Races to Win Creditor Support as Bondholders Hold Out
summary: Raizen SA is considering pushing ahead with a debt restructuring plan over the objections of offshore bondholders, calculating that it has enough backing from bank creditors and local noteholders to win majority support, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: SpaceX Filing Reveals $4.28 Billion Loss, Musk’s Tight Grip
summary: SpaceX filed publicly for what stands to be the largest-ever initial public offering, revealing billions in losses and the super-voting share plan allowing Elon Musk to keep the rocket, satellite and artificial intelligence giant under his control.

title: Asia Centric: BlackRock on Crypto, Tokenization and Future ETFs
summary: Exchange-traded funds are fundamentally reshaping how capital is allocated, skyrocketing to a $22 trillion global industry that Bloomberg Intelligence estimates will surpass $50 trillion by 2035. Investors no longer view them simply as vehicles for broad passive exposure. Instead, ETFs have evolved into portfolio “Lego blocks” used to manage cash yields, seek downside protection and access previously difficult asset classes such as Bitcoin. title: Gold Steadies as Hopes of US-Iran Truce Ease Rate-Hike Bets
summary: Gold was little changed as optimism over efforts to end the Middle East conflict eased bets on interest-rate hikes.

title: Moody’s Cuts Mexico Credit Rating to One Notch Above Junk
summary: Moody’s Ratings cut Mexico’s credit score to the lowest tier of investment grade, citing the country’s weakening fiscal position and stoking concern Latin America’s second-largest economy is heading toward junk status.

title: Asian Stocks to Rise as Nvidia Whipsaws on Results: Markets Wrap
summary: Asian equities were set to climb Thursday after gains on Wall Street that reflected a constructive outlook for US-Iran talks. Nvidia Corp. shares whipsawed in a lukewarm response to its sales forecast.

title: SoftBank-Backed Firm to File for IPO on Data Center Ambition
summary: SoftBank Group Corp.-backed digital infrastructure firm SB Energy Corp. plans to file a confidential draft registration statement for a proposed initial public offering in the US, the company said in a Wednesday statement.

title: Mounting Exporter Strain Risks Complicating China’s Yuan Policy
summary: The yuan’s continued strength is exerting pressure on Chinese exporters on a scale rarely seen in recent years, complicating Beijing’s efforts to manage the pace of currency gains.

title: Musk Ally Gracias Stands to Make Billions Off SpaceX IPO
summary: Antonio Gracias, the founder of Valor Equity Partners and a longtime Elon Musk ally, controls a 7.3% stake in SpaceX, making him the second-largest holder after Musk himself that will earn the investor a giant windfall.

title: AvalonBay, Equity Residential Said to Near Mega-REIT Tie-Up
summary: AvalonBay Communities Inc. and Equity Residential are nearing a deal that will see two of the biggest real estate investment trusts by value combine, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Oil Edges Up After Plunging on Optimism Over US-Iran Agreement
summary: Oil inched higher after plummeting on Wednesday, as President Donald Trump said the US is in the “final stages” with Iran.

title: Bridging Finance Founder David Sharpe Seeks New Appeal in Fraud Case
summary: The former chief executive officer of private credit shop Bridging Finance Inc. will ask Ontario’s highest court to review a fresh ruling that upheld fraud findings against him.

title: Scion Group & Ares Management Team Up to Buy $910M in Student Housing
summary: Scion Group CEO Rob Bronstein said that his team is targeting real estate around universities that represent a 'strong return on investment' in terms of tuition, as his company announces a deal with Ares Management to but  $910M in student housing properties. Bronstein, joined by Bloomberg's Norah Mulinda, said that his investment is aimed at providing a wide net of locations and price points in the student housing market.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SEC Chief Atkins Pumps the Brakes on Prediction-Market Funds
summary: The top US securities regulator is delaying the launch of a wave of novel exchange-traded funds that would let investors wager on events such as elections and economic data as the agency weighs how far the $15 trillion ETF wrapper can stretch.

title: Reeves to Set Out UK Cost of Living Plan to Cushion Iran War Hit
summary: Chancellor of the Exchequer Rachel Reeves will detail a package of measures to ease cost-of-living pressures on Thursday, as the British government tries to limit the impact of the Iran war.

title: Codelco Eyes $2 Billion Gain From Unifying Copper Mines in Chile
summary: Codelco is seeking a combined $2 billion in cost savings and additional revenue by integrating the operations of three copper mines as the state-owned Chilean company tries to offset the impact of stagnating output and rising debt.

title: SpaceX Files for IPO on Nasdaq Under SPCX Symbol
summary: Elon Musk's SpaceX has filed papers to go public on the Nasdaq under the symbol SPCX. SpaceX is targeting as much as $75 billion in its listing at a valuation of more than $2 trillion, people familiar with the matter have said. Ed Ludlow reports on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stocks, Bonds Climb as Oil Falls on US-Iran Hopes: Markets Wrap
summary: A slide in oil prices lifted stocks and bonds amid hopes for a deal to end a war that has rattled financial markets and fueled inflation worries. In late hours, Nvidia Corp. whipsawed after its results.

title: SpaceX’s $20.7 Billion in 2025 CapEx Fueled by AI, Spacecraft
summary: SpaceX facilities in Hawthorne, California. Photographer: Ethan Swope/Bloomberg

title: Emerging Currencies Post Gains as Iran War Hopes Gain Traction
summary: Emerging-market currencies rallied Wednesday, paring losses the day before, as oil prices tumbled on optimism over the outlook for the conflict in the Middle East.

title: Bitcoin Grows More Dependent on Saylor’s Buying Machine
summary: For most of its history, Bitcoin’s price was driven by a sprawling cast of buyers: idealists, speculators, early adopters, and, more recently, institutional investors looking for a new portfolio hedge. Demand was fragmented and hard to predict. In 2026, it is neither.

title: US Seeks to Boost Energy Exports to India as Rubio Visits Delhi
summary: The Trump administration wants to boost energy exports to India, the US ambassador in New Delhi said on Wednesday, ahead of a multi-day visit by Secretary of State Marco Rubio to the world’s most populous country.

title: Oil & Gas M&A Heats Up With $20 Billion of Assets in Play
summary: Buyout shops are finding a rare exit opportunity in the US oil patch.

title: US Treasuries Rebound on Optimism for US-Iran Deal Progress
summary: Treasuries surged on investor optimism that the US and Iran were working toward a deal that could ease a rise in global energy prices that has fanned fears around inflation.

title: NextEra to Buy Dominion for $67B to Form Power Giant
summary: Bloomberg's David Carnevali joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." NextEra Energy agreed to pay about $67 billion in stock for Dominion Energy in the biggest power acquisition ever, creating a giant utility extending from Florida to the artificial intelligence data centers clustered in Virginia. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fed Minutes Show More Officials Warned of Rate-Hike Scenario
summary: A majority of Federal Reserve officials warned the central bank would likely need to consider raising interest rates if inflation continued to run persistently above their 2% target, minutes of the April 28-29 Federal Open Market Committee meeting showed. Mike McKee reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI Is Preparing to File for an IPO in the Coming Weeks
summary: OpenAI is preparing to file for an initial public offering in the coming weeks and is targeting a public debut sometime in the fall. The exact timing remains uncertain. The ChatGPT creator, co-founded by Sam Altman, is one of the world's most valuable and powerful AI companies. Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow has all the details. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Falls as Trump Says US Is in ‘Final Stages’ With Iran
summary: Oil plummeted after US President Donald Trump said the US is in the “final stages” with Iran, raising expectations for a near-term restart of energy flows through the critical Strait of Hormuz.

title: Low Dollar Volatility Forces FX Traders Into Carry, Value
summary: A sharp drop in volatility in the US dollar is pushing traders in the $9.5-trillion-a-day currency market toward carry wagers and bets on relative value in search of profits.

title: More Private Cos. Getting Acquired: Evercore's Kiely
summary: Tammy Kiely, senior managing director in technology investment banking at Evercore, and Wally Cheng, head of global technology M&A at Morgan Stanley, join Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals. (Source: Bloomberg)
